comments.author: @uocav
comments.text: complete misleading crap with AI generated voice - shows nothing of what it says it is about - instead crap visuals of dirty streets in Oman - nothing of the rich Western hotels and pool parites

replies.author: @TheGlobalTruth04
replies.text: Thanks for sharing your feedback. This documentary was intended to highlight everyday life, local culture, and places beyond the luxury resorts. Oman certainly has world-class hotels and beautiful beach resorts too, but the focus here was on a different side of the country. I appreciate you taking the time to watch and share your perspective.
